_comment: Copy to ~/.agents/pai-guards.config.json and add YOUR environment's sensitive paths. Keep this file private — it fingerprints your infrastructure. Patterns are case-insensitive regex, tested against tool inputs. Appended to the engine's generic defaults.

rules.name: my-secret-store
rules.reason: guard: access to the local secret store is denied

rules.name: destructive-rm
rules.reason: guard: recursive-force delete targeting protected directories is denied
